de: Rohstoffmarkt: Iran-Krieg verstärkt Nepals Sorgen, Indien setzt auf Düngemittelimporte. Um diese Krise zu vermeiden, hat die nepalesische Regierung eine wichtige Entscheidung getroffen. Am Montag erlaubte die nepalesische Regierung der „Agriculture Inputs Company“ (AIC), 80.000 Tonnen Lebensmittel aus Indien zu importieren.

en: Commodity Market: Iran war increases Nepal's worries, India turns to fertilizer imports. Due to the ongoing war in West Asia, the supply of fertilizers has stopped all over the world and the prices have increased a lot. To avoid this crisis, the Nepal government has taken a big decision. On Monday, the Nepal government allowed 'Agriculture Inputs Company' (AIC) to import 80,000 tonnes of food from India.
la: Mercatus mercatus: Irania bellum auget curas Nepal, India vices ad importat stercorat. Ob bellum permanentem in Asia occidentali, copia fertilium toto orbe terrarum cessavit et pretia multum aucta sunt. Ad hoc discrimen vitandum, regimen Nepalorum magnum consilium iniit. Die Lunae, regimen Nepalorum permisit "Inputs Societatis Agriculturae" (AIC) ad 80.000 tonnas cibi ex India importare.

IMD Gravis Pluviae erecti: Indicum Meteorologicum Department (IMD) suam praenuntiationem de tempestate usque ad diem 18 Maii pro diversis regionibus expressit. Ob perturbationem occidentis activam et depressionem pressionis areae in Sinus Bengalae formatam, tempestatem ab India septentrionali ad meridiem...
